goal: Create the three-file CLAUDE.md model: root stays cnogo-dev, new generic template for targets, new .claude/CLAUDE.md for workflow docs

tasks.name: Create docs/templates/CLAUDE-generic.md
tasks.action: Create a generic stack-agnostic template for target projects. Same structure as stack templates but with generic placeholders. No Planning Docs section.

tasks.name: Create .claude/CLAUDE.md workflow docs
tasks.action: Create workflow documentation file with Operating Principles, Memory Engine, Planning Docs, Skills Library, and Security sections. Stack-agnostic, installed to all targets.

tasks.name: Trim root CLAUDE.md to cnogo-dev only
tasks.action: Remove Operating Principles, Memory Engine, Planning Docs, and Security sections from root CLAUDE.md. Keep Project Overview, Quick Reference, Code Organisation, Conventions, Key Files.
